rows.label: qev018201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, it's you! How is the Battle Data
Probe? Are you utilizing it well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_JNK0010
rows.name: Gratitude

rows.label: qev018201_SEL0011
rows.name: Express your gratitude to Hugo for giving you something convenient.

rows.label: qev018201_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev018201_SEL0021
rows.name: Shrug and say it wasn't that big a deal.

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0002
rows.name:
No, it's fine. Originally, it
was for the sake of the Earth
Life Colonization Project[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0003
rows.name:
But now I developed that for the
sake of this NLA and the BLADEs.
It's not particularly for honor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0004
rows.name:
...However, to open the eyes of
those stubborn corporate fools, I'll
need you to be even more active![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0005
rows.name:
I can make a further Battle Data Probe,
the Melee Power Up Probe, at any time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0006
rows.name:
The Miranium required this
time is 15000gm! How about
it? Think you can prepare it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0007
rows.name:
The words of you who are actually
using the Battle Data Probe on the
front lines... are heavy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0008
rows.name:
My Battle Data Probe is
useless in actual combat?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Does this mean... what those stubborn
corporate fools were saying was right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Guh... Then how about my next Battle
Data Probe! The Melee Power Up Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0011
rows.name:
The Miranium required this time is
15000gm! Next time for sure, I'll
make something that will satisfy you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0012
rows.name: Good! Then go get it right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Because there are still many Battle
Data Probes that must be revived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0014
rows.name:
I can't afford to stop
in a place like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0016
rows.name:
If you install the Melee Power Up Probe,
you can improve the melee power of BLADEs
fighting in the surrounding area![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0017
rows.name:
You want to try using it right away, don't
you? Then gather the Miranium for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0018
rows.name:
As long as I have the materials,
I can go at any time, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Come on, let's open a new door once again!
Give me the key to the door[ST:wide ]—Miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_JNK0030
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev018201_SEL0031
rows.name: Hand over 15000gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev018201_JNK0040
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev018201_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Alright, wait right there!
I'll make it for you right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0021
rows.name:
With this, BLADEs will be able
to cross swords with enemies
beyond their own capabilities![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0022
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—It's complete! I have
finally accomplished it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0023
rows.name: This is the Melee Power Up Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0024
rows.name:
If you install this at a Frontier Net
Spot, you can improve the melee power of
BLADEs fighting in the surrounding area![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Install it right away! With
that enhanced power, go beat
the crap out of any monster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0026
rows.name:
I still have more Battle
Data Probes I must make![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0027
rows.name:
If you need them, just talk
to me! As long as I have
Miranium, I will revive them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0028
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Hm? What are you putting on airs for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Hurry up and let me start producing
the Melee Power Up Probe.[ST:wait ]
